home.title: SHERLOCK SCHOLES
home.subtitle: Describe a football legend
home.setting_rounds_1v1_hint: Each player explains this many times
home.mode_team_desc: 4+ players, two teams take turns explaining
home.mode_1v1_desc: 2 players, personal score, turns every 60 sec
home.mode_training_desc: One phone, two teams, no internet

tutorial.text_1: Tap 'Create Game' on the home screen, choose a mode and invite your friends.
tutorial.text_2: Got a code from a friend? Enter it on the home screen to join their room.
tutorial.text_3: In team mode — 2+ players per team. In 1v1 — just you and your opponent.
tutorial.text_4: One player sees a card — a footballer, club or term. Their goal: describe it without saying the word directly.
tutorial.text_5: The team (or opponent) shouts guesses. The explainer taps 'Correct' for each right answer.
tutorial.text_6: Rounds alternate. The player or team with the highest score at the end wins!

lobby.invite_friends: Share the code to invite friends
lobby.share_code: Share the code with a friend
lobby.min_players: Minimum 2 players in each team required

share.win_blowout: ⚽ Crushed my opponent {{win}}-{{lose}} in Sherlock Scholes. Beat that → @sherlock_scholes_bot
share.win_normal: ⚽ Won {{win}}-{{lose}} in Sherlock Scholes. Who's next? → @sherlock_scholes_bot
share.win_close: ⚽ Squeaked a win {{win}}-{{lose}} in Sherlock Scholes. Try to repeat → @sherlock_scholes_bot
share.draw: ⚽ Tied {{score}}-{{score}} in Sherlock Scholes. Who'll break it? → @sherlock_scholes_bot
share.lose_close: ⚽ Lost a tight one {{lose}}-{{win}} in Sherlock Scholes. Avenge me → @sherlock_scholes_bot
share.lose_normal: ⚽ Lost {{lose}}-{{win}} in Sherlock Scholes. Reclaim the crown → @sherlock_scholes_bot
share.lose_blowout: ⚽ Got destroyed {{lose}}-{{win}} in Sherlock Scholes. Can you do better? → @sherlock_scholes_bot
